Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dumping Lego NXT firmware off of an existing brick (2025) 210 upvotes, 12 comments
  2. Emacs internals: Deconstructing Lisp_Object in C (Part 2) 75 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. CasNum 287 upvotes, 36 comments
  4. In 1985 Maxell built a bunch of life-size robots for its bad floppy ad 114 upvotes, 14 comments
  5. SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI 52 upvotes, 6 comments
  6. Lisp-style C++ template meta programming 52 upvotes, 7 comments
  7. macOS code injection for fun and no profit (2024) 97 upvotes, 17 comments
  8. Rijksmuseum researchers discover new painting by Rembrandt van Rijn 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  9. Notes on Writing WASM 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Sem – Semantic version control. Entity-level diffs on top of Git 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  11. Ten years of deploying to production 32 upvotes, 5 comments
  12. Show HN: Curiosity – DIY 6" Newtonian Reflector Telescope 28 upvotes, 4 comments
  13. How to run Qwen 3.5 locally 187 upvotes, 54 comments
  14. Autoresearch: Agents researching on single-GPU nanochat training automatically 122 upvotes, 33 comments
  15. FLASH radiotherapy's bold approach to cancer treatment 214 upvotes, 65 comments
  16. The surprising whimsy of the Time Zone Database 129 upvotes, 38 comments
  17. Strike on girls' school that killed 150 in Iran 'likely' carried out by US 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. LLM Writing Tropes.md 209 upvotes, 86 comments
  19. From RGB to L*a*b* color space (2024) 40 upvotes, 11 comments
  20. Warn about PyPy being unmaintained 193 upvotes, 79 comments
  21. Cloud VM benchmarks 2026 251 upvotes, 113 comments
  22. The Lobster Programming Language 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Show HN: A weird thing that detects your pulse from the browser video 86 upvotes, 38 comments
  24. Yoghurt delivery women combatting loneliness in Japan 297 upvotes, 160 comments
  25. Digital Iris [video] 12 upvotes, 2 comments
  26. Files are the interface humans and agents interact with 228 upvotes, 122 comments
  27. A decade of Docker containers 310 upvotes, 208 comments
  28. MonoGame: A .NET framework for making cross-platform games 84 upvotes, 54 comments
  29. Best performance of a C++ singleton 35 upvotes, 22 comments
  30. I'm Not Consulting an LLM 39 upvotes, 33 comments

Last generated 7:00pm, 8 March 2026. Source here.
